title: Scholarship Entrance Exam Grade 7 to 10 Question Bank

questions.prompt: Which sentence shows correct subject-verb agreement?

choices.a: The students is ready for class.
choices.b: The student are ready for class.
choices.c: The student is ready for class.
choices.d: The students was ready for class.

questions.prompt: What does the word generous most nearly mean?
Read the sentence: 'Lina saved two jars for paper and plastic so her family could sort waste at home.' What is the main idea?

choices.b: Lina is helping her family recycle.

questions.prompt: Which option is a complete sentence?

choices.c: Miko finished his homework before dinner.

questions.prompt: Which sentence uses the correct punctuation?
Which transition word shows contrast?
What is 18 + 27 - 9?
What is 3/4 of 40?
A rectangle is 8 cm long and 5 cm wide. What is its perimeter?
Solve for x: x + 7 = 19
Write 0.6 as a fraction in simplest form.
In a class of 35 learners, 14 are boys. What percent of the class are boys?
What is the average of 12, 15, and 18?
If 5 notebooks cost P75, how much does 1 notebook cost?
What is the main source of energy for Earth's water cycle?
Which organ pumps blood through the body?
What is the change from solid to liquid called?
What process do plants use to make their own food?
Which force pulls objects toward Earth?
Which energy resource is nonrenewable?
An animal that eats only plants is called a ____.
What is the smallest unit of life?
The Philippines belongs to which region of Asia?
What does a map scale help you find?
Why are laws important in a community?

choices.b: They help maintain order and protect people.
choices.c: They make maps easier to read.

questions.prompt: Who is usually the elected leader of a city or municipality?
Find the next number: 2, 4, 8, 16, __
Which file type is commonly used for spreadsheets?
Which is the strongest password?
If all squares are rectangles and this shape is a square, what must be true?

choices.d: It has no sides. Grade 7 Teacher

questions.prompt: In the sentence 'The experiment was conducted by Ana,' which voice is used?
Which is the best thesis statement for an essay?

choices.c: Schools should promote daily reading because it improves vocabulary, focus, and imagination.

questions.prompt: Rico opened his umbrella and ran to the covered walkway. What can you infer?
Which word is closest in meaning to accurate?
Which sentence uses a comma correctly after an introductory phrase?

choices.a: After the bell rang the class began.
choices.b: After the bell rang, the class began.
choices.c: After, the bell rang the class began.
choices.d: After the bell, rang the class began.

questions.prompt: Which sentence contains a metaphor?

choices.a: The classroom was as quiet as a library.
choices.b: The classroom became a busy beehive during group work.

questions.prompt: What is (-3) + 8?
What is 20% of 150?
Solve for x: 3x = 24
A triangle has a base of 12 cm and a height of 9 cm. What is its area?
The ratio of boys to girls is 2:3. If there are 25 learners, how many are boys?
Simplify: 2^3 x 2^2
A bus travels 60 km per hour for 2.5 hours. How far does it travel?
A bag has 3 red marbles and 5 blue marbles. What is the probability of choosing a red marble?
Why does sugar dissolve faster in hot water than in cold water?

choices.a: Particles in hot water move faster.

questions.prompt: Which body system includes the brain, spinal cord, and nerves?
Which set is needed for a balanced ecosystem?
Which is a physical change?
What element has the chemical symbol O?
Which type of rock forms when magma or lava cools and hardens?
Which particle has a negative electric charge?
In an experiment, the variable changed by the researcher is the ____ variable.
What is a constitution?

choices.a: The highest law and basic rules of a country

questions.prompt: Longitude lines help measure distance east or west of the ____.
Why is trade important?

choices.a: It lets communities exchange goods and services they need.

questions.prompt: Which is a primary source?

choices.a: A diary written during an event

questions.prompt: Find the next number: 5, 10, 20, 40, __
In most spreadsheet apps, a formula begins with which symbol?
What is a benefit of cloud storage?

choices.a: Files can be accessed online from different devices.

questions.prompt: What is an algorithm?

choices.a: A step-by-step procedure for solving a problem

questions.prompt: What is the tone of this sentence: 'Despite many obstacles, the team believed they could finish the project.'
Which sentence uses parallel structure?

choices.a: She likes reading, writing, and drawing.
choices.b: She likes reading, to write, and draws.
choices.c: She likes to read, writing, and drawing.
choices.d: She likes read, wrote, and drawn.

questions.prompt: Which claim is best supported by evidence?

choices.a: Online practice can improve test readiness because one study showed regular practice increased scores.
choices.b: Online practice is good because I say so.
choices.d: Online practice is the only way to learn.

questions.prompt: In the sentence 'Although the road was rough, the bus arrived on time,' which part is the dependent clause?
Which word has the most positive connotation?
Which sentence uses pronouns clearly?

choices.a: When Ben met Carlo, he gave him his notes.
choices.b: The students submitted their projects before the deadline.
choices.c: Maria told Anna that she was late.
choices.d: The book was beside the bag, and it was blue.

questions.prompt: What is the slope of the line through (2, 3) and (4, 7)?
Solve for x: 2x - 5 = 13
Expand: (x + 3)^2
Compute: 7/8 - 1/4
Using pi = 22/7, what is the circumference of a circle with radius 7 cm?
Factor: x^2 - 9
Solve the system: y = x + 2 and y = 2x - 1
A right triangle has legs of 6 cm and 8 cm. What is the hypotenuse?
What does the atomic number of an element represent?

choices.c: Mass of the atom in grams

questions.prompt: Newton's first law is also known as the law of ____.
Which word equation best describes photosynthesis?

choices.b: Carbon dioxide + water + light -> glucose + oxygen
choices.d: Glucose + oxygen -> carbon dioxide + water + energy

questions.prompt: What molecule carries hereditary information in living things?
A solution with a pH lower than 7 is ____.
What is Earth's outermost solid layer called?
What must an electric circuit have for current to flow?
Acceleration is best described as ____.
Industrialization usually changes an economy by increasing ____.
Which branch or institution interprets laws in many democratic governments?
Inflation means ____.

choices.a: A general rise in prices over time

questions.prompt: Sustainable development aims to balance ____.
If A is greater than B, and B is greater than C, which statement must be true?
Binary code mainly uses which digits?
Why should sources be cited in research?

choices.a: To avoid plagiarism and show where information came from
choices.b: To make the page longer only

questions.prompt: In a flowchart, a diamond shape usually represents a ____.
Which evidence would best strengthen an author's argument about school gardens?

choices.a: A survey showing improved student nutrition after garden activities
choices.d: A statement that gardens are nice

questions.prompt: Which example shows situational irony?

choices.d: A dog barks at a stranger.

questions.prompt: Which sentence uses correct parallel structure?

choices.a: Not only did she review her notes, but also practiced problems.
choices.b: She not only reviewed her notes but also practiced problems.
choices.c: She reviewed not only her notes but also was practicing problems.
choices.d: She not only reviewing notes but also practiced problems.

questions.prompt: Which is the strongest argumentative thesis?

choices.b: Schools should extend library hours because students need safe access to books, computers, and study space after class.

questions.prompt: In 'The meticulous student checked every answer twice,' what does meticulous mean?
In the sentence 'The report, which was submitted late, still received feedback,' the phrase between commas is a ____.
What are the roots of x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0?
What is the distance between points (1, 2) and (4, 6)?
Solve the inequality: 2x + 3 < 11
In a right triangle, sin(theta) equals ____.
An item costs P800 and has a 15% discount. What is the sale price?
If f(x) = 2x^2 - 3, what is f(4)?
Find the volume of a cylinder with radius 3 cm and height 5 cm. Use pi = 3.14.
What is the nth term of the arithmetic sequence 7, 11, 15, 19, ...?
The law of conservation of energy states that energy ____.

choices.c: Can change form but cannot be created or destroyed in a closed system

questions.prompt: Mitosis usually produces ____.
Greenhouse gases affect climate because they ____.
An ionic bond commonly forms when electrons are ____.

choices.b: Transferred from one atom to another

questions.prompt: Sound generally travels fastest through ____.
Osmosis is the movement of ____ through a semipermeable membrane.
Which equation represents Newton's second law of motion?
Which is evidence that scientists use to study evolution?
Globalization is best described as ____.

choices.a: Growing connection among countries through trade, communication, culture, and technology
choices.b: The closing of all borders forever
choices.c: The study of only one village

questions.prompt: Opportunity cost is ____.

choices.a: The next best alternative given up when a choice is made
choices.b: The total money in a bank
choices.d: The price of every item combined

questions.prompt: Human rights are important because they ____.

choices.a: Protect people's dignity and basic freedoms

questions.prompt: What is the goal of disaster risk reduction?

choices.a: To reduce harm by preparing for and lessening disaster risks

questions.prompt: What should you do first if you receive a suspicious link from an unknown sender?

choices.c: Do not click; verify the sender or report it
choices.d: Enter your password to test it

questions.prompt: In a database table, one row usually represents a ____.
Given: If it rains, the ground gets wet. It rains. What conclusion follows?
Why is pseudocode useful?

choices.a: It helps plan program logic before writing actual code.
choices.d: It is only for drawing pictures. Grade 10 Teacher
